data.title: Bitcoin Will Catch Up To Gold Eventually, But Michael Saylor's A Risk, Analysts Say
data.description:
Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) tapped $88,000 on Wednesday amid heightened geopolitical tensions, though some analysts argue the weakness is temporary rather than structural.

Analyst Says Bitcoin–Gold Divergence Is Cyclical, Not Structural

Crypto trader Ansem said Bitcoin's recent lag relative to gold is driven by cyclical and structural factors, not a breakdown of the long-term thesis.

He attributed the divergence to early Bitcoin holders taking profits, four-year cycle dynamics, and portfolio rebalancing as gold and silver break out of a decade-long consolidation.

According to Ansem, renewed demand from high-net-worth individuals and institutions, is driven by Bitcoin's advantages as a "digital analogue" to gold – namely portability, ease of transfer, and suitability for a digitally native financial system.

He added that privacy-focused assets such as Zcash (CRYPTO: ZEC) could also benefit from this narrative, with a longer-term valuation potentially approaching one-tenth of Bitcoin's value.

From a technical perspective, Ansem believes Bitcoin is unlikely to trade below its 2021 cycle peak near $69,000.

He views any drop below Michael Saylor's estimated ~$75,000 cost basis as a capitulation-level, generational buying opportunity.

However, he said the broader bullish thesis would be invalidated if Bitcoin fails to make a new all-time high by 2026.

Overall, Ansem described the current Bitcoin–gold gap as "deep value," arguing that sub-$100,000 accumulation will appear obvious in hindsight.

Critics Warn Michael Saylor's Bitcoin Bet Could Amplify Downside Risk

Not everyone agrees with that view. Crypto analyst Crypto Chase pushed back, arguing that Michael Saylor's massive Bitcoin exposure could deter, rather than attract, institutions and high-net-worth investors.

Chase dismissed the idea that a move below Saylor's average entry would trigger healthy capitulation.

He noted that Saylor is extremely unlikely to sell voluntarily and would likely hold his position unless forced by Strategy's (NASDAQ:MSTR) board.

In a worst-case scenario where Strategy were compelled to liquidate, Chase warned that market demand would be insufficient to absorb the supply, potentially leading to a severe crash unless sales were conducted through large OTC deals, possibly involving government entities.

In his view, an actual Saylor sell would be catastrophic for price rather than bullish.

Image: Shutterstock

data.title: $100 Invested In VanEck Semiconductor ETF 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
data.description:
VanEck Semiconductor ETF (NASDAQ:SMH) has outperformed the market over the past 10 years by 18.59% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 32.16%. Currently, VanEck Semiconductor ETF has a market capitalization of $42.29 billion.

Buying $100 In SMH: If an investor had bought $100 of SMH stock 10 years ago, it would be worth $1,639.86 today based on a price of $394.71 for SMH at the time of writing.

data.title: How To Trade SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, META, TSLA Using Technical Analysis
data.description:
Good Morning Traders!

Today's session continues the shortened trading week with global attention on President Trump's special address from Davos. Markets will be closely watching any commentary tied to trade, geopolitics, or economic policy, as remarks from this forum have the potential to move risk sentiment quickly. 

On the data front, housing will be in focus early with December Housing Starts and Preliminary Building Permits, followed by Redbook Retail Sales. At 10:00AM ET, traders will digest Pending Home Sales and delayed Construction Spending data, offering further insight into demand conditions. The session concludes with a 20 Year Bond Auction at 1:00PM ET, which could influence rates and equity positioning. 

With a lighter calendar overall and a holiday week environment, price action may remain choppy and headline driven. Liquidity conditions can exaggerate moves, so patience and disciplined risk management remain critical.

Now, we will discuss SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, META, and TSLA.

SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY)

SPY is currently trading around 676.25 as the session develops within a shortened holiday week. Buyers are attempting to stabilize price above this area early, and if they can hold firm, a rotation higher into 678.10 becomes possible. Continued strength could allow price to work into 679.60, where overhead supply may start to respond. A stronger bid could open the door toward 681.00, especially if broader market sentiment improves following the morning data. 

If SPY fails to hold 676.25, sellers may begin pressing price into 674.80. A clean loss there increases the risk of a move into 673.20. Should downside momentum build, price could unwind toward 671.75. Continued weakness below that level would suggest risk is being reduced ahead of upcoming macro events, opening the door for deeper intraday pullbacks.

Invesco QQQ Trust Series 1 (QQQ)

QQQ is currently trading around 606.00, with tech attempting to find balance after recent volatility. If buyers can defend this area, a push into 607.85 may develop. Sustained strength could carry price toward 609.40, where momentum traders may look for follow through. A broader tech bid could extend the move into 611.00 if buyers remain in control. 

If QQQ loses 606.00, selling pressure may pull price down toward 604.50. A break below that level could invite a move into 602.90. Continued downside could stretch into 601.25 as sellers lean into rallies. Failure to stabilize there would indicate growing caution across growth names.

Apple Inc. (AAPL)

Apple is currently trading around 246.25 as buyers attempt to defend a key short term area. Holding this level could allow price to lift into 247.40, with additional upside targeting 248.75. If buyers remain active, AAPL may rotate toward 250.00, where sellers are likely to respond. A clean reclaim above that zone would improve the short term outlook. 

If AAPL breaks below 246.25, sellers may press price into 245.10. A loss of that level opens the door toward 243.85. Continued weakness could bring 242.50 into focus. Failure to find demand there would suggest Apple remains under distribution pressure.

Microsoft Corp. (MSFT)
Microsoft is currently trading around 452.25, where buyers are trying to slow recent downside momentum. If support holds, price may grind into 454.10, followed by a potential test of 455.75. Sustained buying could allow MSFT to stretch into 457.50, especially if the broader market firms. 

If MSFT slips below 452.25, sellers may look to test 450.90. A breakdown there exposes 449.25 as the next downside area. Continued selling pressure could drive price toward 447.75, signaling tech leadership remains fragile.

NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA)

NVIDIA is currently trading around 178.00, sitting near an important pivot zone. If buyers step in here, a push into 179.60 may develop. Continued strength could lift price toward 181.25, with upside momentum potentially extending into 183.00 if sentiment improves across semiconductors. 

If NVDA fails to hold 178.00, sellers may drive price into 176.50. A loss of that level opens the door toward 174.90. Sustained downside could drag price into 173.25, reflecting reduced risk appetite across high beta names.

Alphabet Inc Class A (GOOGL)

Alphabet is currently trading around 318.50, with buyers attempting to regain short term structure. Holding this level could allow price to move into 320.10. Continued strength may bring 321.75 into play. A stronger tape could support an extension toward 323.50. 

If GOOGL breaks below 318.50, sellers may push price into 316.90. Further weakness could target 315.25. If downside momentum accelerates, price may slide toward 313.75 as buyers step aside.

Meta Platforms Inc (META)

Meta is currently trading around 604.00, where bulls are trying to defend a critical support area. A hold here could lead to a move into 606.50, followed by a potential test of 609.00. If buyers remain aggressive, META could stretch into 611.75. 

If 604.00 fails, sellers may take control and push price into 601.90. Continued pressure could bring 599.50 into focus. A deeper slide would suggest weakness spreading across large cap tech.

Tesla Inc. (TSLA)

Tesla is currently trading around 418.00 as volatility remains elevated. If buyers can hold this level, price may rebound into 420.75. Continued upside could target 423.50, with a stronger rally potentially reaching 426.00 if momentum builds. 

If TSLA loses 418.00, sellers may drive price into 415.90. A breakdown there exposes 413.25. Continued selling could drag price toward 410.75, keeping Tesla under heavy pressure.

Final Word: Trade carefully and stay flexible.

Benzinga Disclaimer: This article is from an unpaid external contributor. It does not represent Benzinga’s reporting and has not been edited for content or accuracy.

data.title: Charles Schwab Hits $11.9 Trillion In Assets, Trading Volumes Jump 31%
data.description:
Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) stock rose Wednesday after it reported fourth-quarter fiscal 2025 results.

  • SCHW is gathering positive momentum. Watch the momentum here.

The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $1.39, up 38% year over year (Y/Y), in line with consensus.

The company reported quarterly revenue of $6.336 billion, up 19% Y/Y, narrowly missing the Street's estimate of $6.369 billion.

Details

Trading revenue increased 22% Y/Y to $1.07 billion due to continued strong engagement.

Meanwhile, net interest revenue gained 25% Y/Y to $3.17 billion in the quarter, with the net interest margin expanding by 57 basis points Y/Y to 2.90%.

Asset management and administration fees increased by 15% Y/Y to $1.7 billion, led by organic growth, improved equity markets, and higher utilization of the wealth and asset management solutions.

The average daily trading volume reached 8.3 million, which is an increase of 31% compared to the fourth quarter of 2024.

Margin loan balances reached $112.3 billion at the end of the quarter, reflecting a 34% increase compared to year-end 2024.

Other Key Figures

In the quarter under review, total client assets increased 18% Y/Y to a record $11.9 trillion.

Record fourth-quarter core net new assets of $163.9 billion bring total 2025 asset gathering to $519.4 billion, up 42% Y/Y.

New brokerage account openings topped 1 million for the fifth straight quarter, lifting active brokerage accounts to 38.5 million and total client accounts to 46.5 million.

The company exited the fourth quarter with cash and cash equivalents worth $46.0 billion.

The bank had $255.7 billion in deposits at the end of the quarter, down 1% Y/Y. During the quarter, the company repurchased 29.2 million shares for $2.7 billion.

Management Commentary

President & CEO Rick Wurster stated, "Clients are conducting more of their financial lives at Schwab, with record engagement across wealth management, trading, and banking. Net inflows into our Managed Investing solutions grew by 36% versus 2024, while bank loan originations achieved another record year."

"Doing more for our growing client base bolsters Schwab's diversified revenue model. In 2025, the combination of our business momentum, strong engagement, and favorable equity markets resulted in record revenue of $23.9 billion – up 22% versus the prior year," added CFO Mike Verdeschi.

SCHW Price Action: Charles Schwab shares were up 0.02% at $101.01 during premarket trading on Wednesday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Image via Shutterstock

data.title: FDA Green Lights Avalon GloboCare's KetoAir Breathalyzer
data.description:
Avalon GloboCare Corp (NASDAQ:ALBT) stock is trading lower on Wednesday. Apparently, there is no news to justify the movement.

Avalon GloboCare, a company for precision diagnostic consumer products, on Tuesday announced the renewal of the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) establishment registration for its KetoAir device, a handheld breathalyzer designed for ketogenic health management.

The device measures breath acetone concentration (BrAce), a key biomarker associated with fat metabolism and nutritional ketosis. Leveraging nano-sensor technology, KetoAir provides users with real-time, non-invasive insights into metabolic state through breath analysis.

The device is intended for individuals pursuing ketogenic diets for weight management, athletic performance, and therapeutic or lifestyle-based ketogenic programs.

KetoAir is compatible with both iOS and Android smartphones, with companion applications available through the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.

The company plans to launch the device in both business-to-business (B2B) and business-to-consumer (B2C) markets, aiming to enhance marketing and distribution efforts through its subsidiary, Avalon Quantum AI, LLC.

Avalon plans to initiate marketing efforts in the second quarter of 2026, which the Interim CEO, Meng Li, described as an important milestone for the company.

ALBT Faces Significant Bearish Momentum

The stock is currently trading 31.1% below its 20-day simple moving average (SMA) and 55.5% below its 100-day SMA, indicating significant bearish momentum. Over the past 12 months, shares have decreased by 70.51%, and they are currently positioned closer to their 52-week lows than highs.

The RSI is at 39.65, which is considered neutral territory, suggesting the stock is neither overbought nor oversold. Meanwhile, MACD is above its signal line, indicating a potential bullish trend.

The combination of neutral RSI and bullish MACD suggests mixed momentum for the stock.

  • Key Resistance: $1.00
  • Key Support: $0.75

ALBT Price Action: Avalon Globocare shares were down 23.64% at $0.84 at the time of publication on Wednesday. The stock is trading at a new 52-week low, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Photo via Shutterstock
